match.userMessage:
Slow dolly forward tightens the frame on Scarlett's hands at the white marble vanity. Her right hand twists the lipstick base once in a smooth motion, extending the vivid coral bullet upward until it catches the sharp window sunlight. Her left hand holds the tube steady. Gaze remains down with a soft smile. Gentle handheld micro-drift keeps the focus tactile. Ocean light shifts subtly across the rising surface as her fingers complete the twist.

gentle ocean waves through open window. soft mechanical click of lipstick twisting.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
